name_en: Top-tier replica, pure steel hardware, changing code chip
name_cn:
Top-tier replica, pure steel hardware, changing code chip
M25341 Black M25342 Brown M25343 Green
This Low Key Cabas Medium Bag is crafted with soft grained calfskin and suede lining, exuding a refined style. The brand's iconic lock embodies a blend of elegant aesthetics and security, while the adjustable handle allows for effortless switching between hand and shoulder carry.
47 x 30 x 14 cm
(Length x Height x Width)
Grained calfskin
Calfskin trim
Suede lining
Metal hardware
Hook closure
Lock
Detachable Monogram zip pocket
Fits smartphone, keys, wallet, and 13-inch laptop
Handles: Double handles
Made in France, Spain, Italy, or the USA
